_readme: Copy this file as config.json in the plugin root. Adjust paths and tags for your project.

plugin._readme: Filenames only — resolved relative to the plugin directory (__dirname). Do not use paths here.
plugin._hooks_enabled_readme: Toggle individual hook behaviors. All default to true if omitted.

consensus._readme: Evidence submission via audit_submit MCP tool → SQLite. planning_dirs are repo-root relative.

roles._readme: Provider:model per consensus role. Available: codex, claude, openai, gemini, ollama, vllm.

sections._readme: Section headings used to parse your feedback files. Must match the actual ## headings you write.

doc_patterns._readme: Regex patterns and template strings used when generating document sections. Adjust for your language.
doc_patterns.reset_criteria_text: The scope must confirm that `{focus}` corrections and related lint/test re-passes are verified before promoting to `{agree_tag}`.

quality_rules._readme: Run ESLint on edited TypeScript files under src/ or tests/.
quality_rules.label: eslint

quality_rules._readme: Run npm audit when package.json or lockfile is edited.
quality_rules.label: npm-audit

quality_rules._readme: Example: run Rust clippy on .rs files under src/.
quality_rules.label: clippy

parliament._readme: Parliamentary deliberation settings. Overrides consensus.roles for parliament sessions.

roles._readme: Override consensus.roles for parliament. CLI flags take priority over this section.
